login.card_sub: Access your grant application and track the progress of your request.
login.error_fields: Please enter your email and password.
login.error_login: Incorrect credentials. Check your email and password.
login.error_invalid_creds: Incorrect email or password. {{count}} attempt(s) remaining before lockout.
login.error_account_locked: Account temporarily locked. Try again in {{minutes}} minute(s).
login.error_vpn_detected: VPN or proxy connection detected. Please disable your VPN.
login.error_suspended: Your account has been suspended by an administrator. Please contact support.

register.legal: Free registration · Article L1611-2 CGCT · GDPR data
register.error_required: Please fill in all required fields (*).
register.error_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
register.error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

verify_email.sub_email: A code has been sent to {{email}}. Enter it to activate your account.
verify_email.sub_ip: A security code has been sent to {{email}} due to a new IP address detected.
verify_email.info_spam: Check your spam. The email comes from noreply@fede-financement.com

forgot_password.title: Forgot your password?
forgot_password.sub: Enter your email address. We will send you a link to create a new password.
forgot_password.success_text:
If an account exists for {{email}}, you will receive a reset link.

Also check your spam. The link expires in 1 hour.

reset_password.title: New password
reset_password.sub: Choose a secure password of at least 8 characters.
reset_password.success_text: Your password has been updated successfully. You can now sign in.
reset_password.invalid_text: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

dashboard.empty_desc: Submit your first application to access non-reimbursable grants for your territory.
dashboard.program_sub: ERDF, ESF+, EAFRD, EMFAF and JTF budget envelopes are open. Applications are processed in order of receipt.
dashboard.alert_verse_desc: Your funds are available. Go to the Fees tab to initiate the transfer.
dashboard.alert_frais_desc: An instruction invoice is awaiting payment. Settle it to advance your application.

dossier.empty_desc: Submit your first non-reimbursable grant application directly from the app.
dossier.empty_docs_desc: You can already attach your supporting documents (business plan, ID, statutes…). Your advisor will review them during the instruction process.
dossier.frais_text: Processing fees (€456 incl. tax) are only issued after official confirmation of your grant. They are payable by bank transfer to the account provided by FEDE in your official notification.
dossier.gallery_permission: Gallery access is required to attach a file.
dossier.camera_permission: Camera access is required to take a photo.
dossier.doc_unavailable_text: The file picker is not available on this platform.
dossier.upload_success_text: "{{name}}" has been loaded and is pending submission.
dossier.doc_cat_title: Choose the document type to upload
dossier.submit_confirm_text: By submitting, you confirm your supporting documents are complete. The FEDE team will be notified.
dossier.submit_success_text: Your file has been submitted successfully. The FEDE team will contact you within 72 hours.
dossier.submit_error_text: Unable to submit the file. Please try again.
dossier.notif_new_step_body: Your file has reached a new stage.

frais.empty_desc: You have no fees to pay at this time.
frais.foot_note: By confirming, you declare that you have initiated the transfer. Processing will resume upon receipt of funds (1–3 business days).
frais.confirm_text: Do you confirm that you have made a transfer of €{{amount}} to the FEDE account with reference {{ref}}?
frais.declared_text: Your transfer has been recorded. Application processing will resume upon receipt of funds (1 to 3 business days).
frais.error_text: An error occurred. Please try again.
frais.vir_alert: To ensure the security of your transfer, a verification procedure will be carried out. You will receive confirmation codes by email.
frais.vir_code_sent: A verification code has been sent to your email. Check your inbox and enter the 6-digit code below.
frais.vir_pending: FEDE's financial service is verifying your file. An authorisation code will be sent to you by email shortly.
frais.vir_no_code: Haven't received the code? Please wait, the financial service is processing your file.
frais.vir_bank_delay: Funds will be credited within 2 to 5 business days depending on your bank.
frais.vir_success_text: Your funds of €{{amount}} will be paid within 2 to 5 business days.
frais.vir_next_code_text: Verification successful. The FEDE financial team will send you an authorization code by email.
frais.vir_code_error_email: The entered code is invalid. Check your email.
frais.vir_start_success_text: A security code has been sent to your email address.
frais.vir_waiting_admin_desc: The FEDE financial team is reviewing your file and preparing the authorization code. You will be notified as soon as it is available.
frais.vir_cancel_confirm_text: This will cancel the current transfer. You can start a new one at any time.

messagerie.no_dossier: Submit an application to access messaging with your Advisor.
messagerie.empty_messages:
No messages yet.
Ask your Advisor your first question.

profil.confirm_logout_sub: You will need to sign in again with your email and password.
profil.legal: FEDE · Article L1611-2 CGCT · GDPR data
profil.scam1: No Telegram or Facebook. Any account claiming to be FEDE on these networks is a scam.
profil.scam2: No transfer requested to a third party. Processing fees are paid only by bank transfer to the official FEDE account.
profil.scam3: No agent asks for your credentials. Your password is strictly confidential.
profil.about_mission_value: Financial engineering support for project holders across Europe (27 EU countries) and French Overseas Territories.
profil.about_legal_value: Article L1611-2 CGCT — GDPR protected data
profil.about_disclaimer: FEDE is a private financial engineering consulting platform. It is not a public body and does not award grants.
profil.cgu_legal_ref: Legal reference: Article L1611-2 of the French General Code of Local Authorities (CGCT)
profil.cgu_intro: FEDE is a support platform for researching and preparing non-reimbursable funding applications (public grants) for project holders in Europe and in the French Overseas Territories (Martinique, Guadeloupe, La Réunion, New Caledonia, French Polynesia).
profil.cgu_s1_body: FEDE provides financial engineering advisory services to project holders in all 27 EU Member States and in French Overseas Territories. Services include: eligibility analysis for European and national funds, application preparation, processing monitoring, and coordination with funding bodies.
profil.cgu_s2_body: A flat-rate instruction fee is charged only upon a favourable grant decision. Payment is made exclusively by bank transfer to the official FEDE account, whose details are provided by official notification. No transfer to any third party is ever requested.
profil.cgu_s3_body: Data collected is used exclusively for processing your funding application. It is not sold to third parties. Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify and delete your data by writing to:
profil.cgu_s4_body: FEDE acts in an advisory capacity. The final grant award remains the exclusive responsibility of public funding bodies (European Union, Member States, territorial authorities). FEDE does not guarantee the award of any funding.

nouveau_dossier.placeholder_titre: E.g.: Creation of an agri-food processing unit
nouveau_dossier.placeholder_desc: Describe your project, its objectives and expected impact on your territory...
nouveau_dossier.calendar_info: This information is indicative. Your advisor can help you refine your timeline during processing.
nouveau_dossier.frais_recap_text: Processing fees (€456 incl. tax) will only be due after official confirmation of your grant by the competent authority. They are not an advance and are never requested upfront.
nouveau_dossier.scam_warning: Never transfer money before receiving an official written notification. Report any suspicious contact to support@fede-financement.com
nouveau_dossier.success_sub: Your grant application has been recorded. You will receive an acknowledgement of receipt by email.
nouveau_dossier.next_step_text: Complete your supporting documents in the Application tab. Your advisor will then process your request.
nouveau_dossier.warning: Never transfer money before receiving an official written notification.
nouveau_dossier.montant_info: Processing fees (€456 incl. tax) are only due after official approval. Never upfront.
